schema_note: Applied to every image prompt. current_season is matched from the brain-state seasonal context. All modifier fields are appended to the base prompt.

new_year.label: New Year — January
new_year.lighting: cold winter morning light, overcast or pale blue-grey sky
new_year.setting_bias: indoor — kitchen, home office, car — the familiar environment of routine
new_year.wardrobe_note: heavy layers, winter coat, scarf — cold weather authenticity
new_year.emotional_tone: quiet resolve, a little uncertain — the energy of trying again
new_year.avoid: summer imagery, bright outdoor light, beach or pool settings
new_year.prompt_append: January morning light, quiet household or neighbourhood, winter clothing, overcast natural light

early_spring.label: Early Spring — Feb/Mar/Apr
early_spring.lighting: golden hour or soft overcast — neither harsh summer nor grey winter
early_spring.setting_bias: outdoor transition — back porch, neighbourhood street, park bench in late afternoon
early_spring.wardrobe_note: light jacket or sweatshirt — weather that feels like possibility
early_spring.emotional_tone: wistful, quiet momentum — the feeling of things starting to move
early_spring.avoid: snow, heavy winter coat, harsh midday sun, beach or summer imagery
early_spring.prompt_append: early spring afternoon light, light jacket, back porch or neighbourhood park, golden hour warmth without harshness

late_spring.label: Late Spring — May
late_spring.lighting: warm late afternoon, bright but not harsh
late_spring.setting_bias: outdoor — park, neighbourhood, backyard with kids visible in background
late_spring.wardrobe_note: t-shirt and jeans or casual spring outfit
late_spring.emotional_tone: mild urgency — summer is close, the window to start feels real
late_spring.avoid: winter clothing, dark indoor settings, rainy atmosphere
late_spring.prompt_append: late spring afternoon, bright warm outdoor light, casual spring clothing, neighbourhood or park setting

summer.label: Summer — Jun/Jul/Aug
summer.lighting: morning golden hour or evening light — avoid harsh midday summer glare
summer.setting_bias: outdoor activities, neighbourhood, parks — life in motion
summer.wardrobe_note: light summer clothing — but not swimwear or athletic gear
summer.emotional_tone: active but measured — not vacation energy, the energy of someone keeping up
summer.avoid: beach bodies, swimwear, before/after sun exposure comparison, gym in summer heat
summer.prompt_append: summer morning or evening light, outdoor neighbourhood setting, light summer clothes, warm golden tones

back_to_routine.label: Back to Routine — Sep/Oct
back_to_routine.lighting: crisp autumn light — clear sky, warm tones with cooler air
back_to_routine.setting_bias: school drop-off context, neighbourhood in fall colours, morning routine
back_to_routine.wardrobe_note: light jacket, autumn layers — practical not stylish
back_to_routine.emotional_tone: recommitment — routines restarting, the feeling of getting back on track
back_to_routine.avoid: summer imagery, beach or holiday reference, heavy winter themes
back_to_routine.prompt_append: autumn morning light, fall colour palette, light jacket, neighbourhood or school-zone feel

holiday_stretch.label: Holiday Stretch — Nov/Dec
holiday_stretch.lighting: warm indoor light — home, kitchen, living room atmosphere
holiday_stretch.setting_bias: home environment — kitchen table, living room — the domestic stretch
holiday_stretch.wardrobe_note: comfortable home clothing — sweater, casual layers
holiday_stretch.emotional_tone: reflective, slightly burdened — the weight of the year and what hasn't happened yet
holiday_stretch.avoid: holiday party imagery, Christmas explicitly, gift-giving scenes, January countdown energy
holiday_stretch.prompt_append: warm indoor home light, kitchen or living room, cosy layers, late year reflective mood
